documents.planBody:
# Migration plan: LoginTest.java

## Source framework

**Selenium Java** — JUnit 5 + PageFactory + WebDriverWait.

## Anti-patterns detected

| Severity | KB-ID | Anti-pattern |
|---|---|---|
| H | KB-1.3.1 | Thread.sleep hard wait |
| M | KB-1.3.12 | WebDriverWait explicit wait |
| M | KB-1.3.23 | @FindBy PageFactory locator |

# Migration plan: CheckoutTest.java

## Source framework

**Selenium Java** — JUnit 5 + WebDriverWait.

## Anti-patterns detected

| Severity | KB-ID | Anti-pattern |
|---|---|---|
| H | KB-1.3.1 | Thread.sleep hard wait |
| M | KB-1.3.5 | Implicit wait timeout |

# Migration plan: form.cy.js

## Source framework

cypress

## Anti-patterns detected

| Severity | KB-ID | Anti-pattern |
|---|---|---|
| H | KB-1.2.1 | cy.wait hard wait |
| M | KB-1.2.3 | cy.contains text-based locator |
